zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles於1354年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其時，他的父親Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth27歲，母親Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor37歲。他去世於1399年12月在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾也斯特也斯特 卡素享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles于1354年出生在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安格雷布利其时，他的父亲Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth27岁，母亲Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor37岁。他去世于1399年12月在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾也斯特也斯特 卡素享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haye,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Willi.

North German, East Frisian, and Dutch: from a personal name, Frisian Hajo, ancient Germanic Haio; or from a short form of the female name Hadewig, composed of the elements hadu ‘battle, strife’ + wīg ‘war’.

variants.name: Deshayes
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived by an enclosure, from the plural of Old French haye ‘hedge’ (see Haye and Hayes ), with fused preposition and definite article des ‘from the’; or a habitational name denoting someone from Les Hayes, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Deshaies .

variants.name: Hayenga
meanings: East Frisian: patronymic from the personal name Hajo (see Haye 1). It is formed with the suffix -enga, a variant of -inga (from the patronymic suffix -ing and genitive plural ending -a).

variants.name: Hey
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): variant of   Hay  .
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Heij, a topographic name for someone who lived on a heath, Dutch hei, heide.
German: metonymic occupational name for a grower or mower of grass, from Middle High German höu ‘grass, hay’.

variants.name: Hayen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse.  German Heinz, Wilhelm.
Flemish, East Frisian, and North German: patronymic from   Haye   1.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles was born in 1354, in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth, was 27 and his mother, Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor, was 37. He died in December 1399, in Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles est né en 1354, à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor, avait 37 ans. Il est décédé en décembre 1399, à Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles 1354 in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth 27 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor 37. Er starb im Dezember 1399 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles è nato il nel 1354 nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor, aveva 37 anni. Morì nel dicembre 1399, nel Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peeblesが1354年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジで生まれた時，父Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworthは27歳，母Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochorは37歳であった。彼は1399年12月にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアイエスターイエスター カストルで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles(이)가 1354년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1399년 12월 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 예스터 예스터 카스틀에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles nasceu em 1354, em Gorebridge, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor, tinha 37 anos. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1399, em Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles родился в 1354 г. в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor, 37. Он умер декабрь 1399 г. в местности иестир кастл, иестир, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas De Haye, Sheriff Of Peebles nació en 1354, en Gorebridge, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Willam Hay Knight of Locherworth, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Douglas, Countess of Lochor, tenía 37 años. Murió en diciembre de 1399, en Yester Castle, Yester, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 45 años.
